title: 後日譚④　～そしてまたゲートは開く～

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Air Groove! It's time for you and me to do our best dancin'!
Hoooold! And lift!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! Then, I'll cast confetti into the air, and it will fall like
snowflakes of gold and silver! A deep and moving performance this
will be!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's calm down a little! That concert has gotten you both way
too excited!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Well, I can say with much joy and confidence, their sustained
excitement is a clear result of how meaningful the commemorative
concert was.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I received lots of messages from the folks back home saying
they were all happy to see it, even though they couldn't attend in
person.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So, I think we should eat a lot to celebrate how successful the event
was at making everyone happy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ha...hahaha, that's right! Ah, but, I would appreciate it if you
practiced a bit of restraint in your celebration.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Brian. ♪ What did you think of the concert? Which of my
songs touched your heart?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Maybe "Endless Dream!!"? Your song "BLAZE" was pretty—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No. Listen, eat some more meat. You won't grow any muscle if you
only eat sweets.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Typical Brian! We're supposed to be having fun, you know!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And? Concerts and parties are rewards for running. If you wanna
attend another, you'd better be fit to fight for it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I want to express my thanks to you both for your hard work
in preparing the commemorative concert and today's after-party.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I hate to interrupt, President. However, I received notice from a track
attendant saying they spotted students out running while they were
supposed to be at the party.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I also see your name here, Brian. Care to enlighten me as to why?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha! No, no, it's all right. I had considered warning the students not
to get too swept up in the party mood, but there was no need.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The fall G1 season will begin soon—and it seems everyone is
preparing to forge their futures.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The curtain has fallen on the radiant stage, and the sound of cheers
has settled down. Soon, the gate to another heart-stopping race will
open!
